features: Safe and Gentle: Bad witchs temporary tattoos are made with a non-toxic, hypoallergenic formula that is safe for the skin, even for sensitive skin.

Multiple Patterns: You will receive 20 Wicked temporary tattoos, the diverse temporary tattoos can be applied on the arm, collarbone, back of the hand and leg as decoration, the variety of patterns bring endless fun for kids.
Long Lasting And Waterproof: High quality witch temporary tattoos last 2-5 days, resistant to swimming, sweat and rubbing. Ideal for summer party, theme party, Halloween night or daily dress up.

Easy To Use: The fake temporary tattoos are easy to use and quick to apply in 30 seconds: just press with a damp cloth and peel off the tattoo paper! Can be scrubbed with make-up remover, make-up remover, medical alcohol, convenient and simple.

Suitable For Multiple Occasions: Witch temporary tattoos are an ideal gift for kids, suitable for many occasions such as group activities, birthday party favours, DIY decorations, children's gifts, adding a touch of magic to any celebration.
description: Product description Featuring witch-themed designs, these waterproof temporary tattoos are safe, easy to apply and last for days. The waterproof is perfect for pool parties or themed parties and each pack includes 20 brightly patterned sheets to inspire creativity. They are hypoallergenic, gentle on the skin and peel off easily with soap, making them ideal for group events or party bag fillers. Make every celebration magical! ﻿ ﻿ Specification: Colour: Multicoloured with glitter ﻿Theme:Witch Package includes: 20 Sheets Bad Witchs Temporary Tattoos ﻿ NOTE: 1.Due to manual measurement, there will be an error of 1-3 cm. 2.Colors may vary slightly due to different screen displays. 3.If you have any questions or dissatisfaction with our products, please feel free to ask questions. Directions 1. Press with a damp cloth and peel off the tattoo paper. 2. Can be scrubbed with make-up remover, make-up remover, medical alcohol for easy removal. Safety Warning Not suitable for children under 3 years old See more
